results.name: clearinghouse_adl_orchestrator

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: sret return is a 24B enum (tag at +0, two u64 payload fields); rsi is a position/asset map struct with a slice field at +0x78/+0x80 of 0xd0-byte entries; rdx is a u64 oracle/asset id; rcx is a 24B AssetInfo (u128 market_state + u64 extra); r8 is a clearinghouse-like struct with a slice of 0xc8-byte position items at +0x8/+0x10. Layout score 1.00 perfect.
results.c_decl: void f(struct LiquidationCheck* _ret, struct OracleAsset* position, uint64_t oracle_price, struct AssetInfo* asset_info, struct Clearinghouse* clearinghouse)
